feed.title: Text & Talk...
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Text & Talk... (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Empathy as dynamic social meaning-making: audience responses to patient-generated materials about endometriosis care
entry.summary: Authors: Elisabeth El Refaie DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0219 Pages: Page range: 291-311

entry.title: Motivational interviewing and the reframing of identity: small stories in first encounters between clients with alcohol use disorders and their therapists
entry.summary: Authors: Cindie A. Aaen Maagaard, Anette Søgaard Nielsen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0161 Pages: Page range: 313-338

entry.title: Shifting from a ‘just’ to a ‘fair’ transition in environmental discourse: a case of old wine in a new bottle?
entry.summary: Authors: Pietro Manzella DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0156 Pages: Page range: 339-356

entry.title: Unveiling romance in categories: exploring compatibility in Tinder conversations
entry.summary: Authors: Carles Roca-Cuberes, Michael Mora-Rodriguez, Julio Hardisson-Guimerà DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0159 Pages: Page range: 357-381

entry.title: Praising the client in career guidance
entry.summary: Authors: Sanna Vehviläinen, Liisa Voutilainen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0206 Pages: Page range: 383-407

entry.title: “Kaigewanxiao” (‘Just kidding’): the use of humor markers in Chinese media discourse
entry.summary: Authors: Zhiwei Zhao, Chengtuan Li, Jing Han, Huhua Ouyang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/text-2024-0180 Pages: Page range: 409-428
